name: Quality Bars Overview
summary: 8 mandatory quality bars must pass before merging to Cold: Integrity, Reachability, Nonlinearity, Gateways, Style, Determinism, Presentation, Accessibility.

content.text:
## The 8 Quality Bars

Every merge to Cold must pass all 8 bars:

### 1. Integrity
References resolve; no unintended dead ends; state effects don't create contradictions.

### 2. Reachability
Must-see beats (keystones, required items) reachable via at least one viable path.

### 3. Nonlinearity
Hubs/loops/gateways exist where intended and matter to play (not decorative).

### 4. Gateways
Conditions are consistent, enforceable by PN, and spoiler-safe on surface.

### 5. Style
Voice, register, motifs align with guardrails; PN remains in-voice.

### 6. Determinism (when promised)
Assets reproducible from recorded parameters (seed, model, etc.).

### 7. Presentation
Player surfaces contain no spoilers or internal plumbing.

### 8. Accessibility
Navigation clear; alt text present; sensory considerations respected.

### Gatekeeper's Role

- Gatekeeper enforces all 8 bars
- Block with specific bar citation and smallest viable fix
- No merge on fail (exceptions are rare, explicit, time-boxed)
